summary: Tested Crew Split functionality integration into Scheduled Booking workflow. Backend endpoints all working (9/9 tests pass). Fixed Profile.username bug in user search endpoint. Frontend code review confirms proper implementation of 5-step booking flow with crew split toggle.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Profile model doesn't have 'username' field - updated /api/users/search, /api/users/{id}/recent-buddies, and /api/users/{id}/following endpoints to generate username from full_name
Crew Split toggle has data-testid='crew-split-toggle' at line 457 of ScheduledBookingDrawer.js
5-step progress indicator implemented: time -> location -> crew -> payment -> confirm (lines 1102-1126)
Crew member search input has data-testid='crew-search-input' at line 517
Price per person calculation: totalPrice / maxParticipants (line 849)
Group discounts properly applied: 2+ surfers, 3+ surfers, 5+ surfers (lines 836-845)
Captain share calculation: pricePerPerson (captain pays their share, line 850)
SavedCrewSelector component properly imported and used (lines 25, 582-596)
Backend POST /api/bookings/{id}/send-crew-requests endpoint exists and validates booking (lines 1415-1544 in bookings.py)
Backend GET /api/users/search returns user search results (lines 301-339 in profiles.py)
Backend GET /api/users/{id}/recent-buddies returns buddies list (lines 342-385 in profiles.py)
Backend GET /api/users/{id}/following returns following list (lines 388-419 in profiles.py)
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/profiles.py - Fixed username field references in search_users, get_recent_buddies, get_following_list endpoints

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - all features implemented correctly

test_credentials.note: Login with test credentials failed (Invalid password). Used API testing instead.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Crew Split feature fully implemented. Backend endpoints working: /api/users/search, /api/users/{id}/recent-buddies, /api/users/{id}/following, /api/bookings/{id}/send-crew-requests. Frontend ScheduledBookingDrawer has 5-step flow with crew split toggle in step 3. Fixed bug where Profile.username was referenced but doesn't exist - now generates username from full_name.

bug_fixed.issue: Profile model doesn't have 'username' attribute causing 500 error on /api/users/search
bug_fixed.root_cause: Code referenced Profile.username which doesn't exist in the model
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to generate username from full_name: p.full_name.lower().replace(' ', '_')
